title: Roughing: From Square to Round
brief: Mount the blank and use the roughing gouge to bring a square blank down to a cylinder. Focus on bevel contact — keep the bevel riding the wood at all times.

coachingCues.message: Catch! You lost bevel contact — flatten your angle before engaging the edge.
Tearout — try cutting downhill, from high point to low.
Clean cylinder! You've found bevel contact. That's the foundation of everything.
